===={{aniseries|JN}}====
[[File:Cilan JN.png|thumb|250px|Cilan in ''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]'']]
Cilan reappeared in several flashbacks of ''[[JN065|Thrash of the Titans!]]''.

In ''[[JN106|Radio Lulled the Mischievous Stars!]]'', it was revealed that Cilan had become a listener of Team Rocket's new radio show, which he sent a letter to using the pseudonym "Radio Connoisseur".

In ''[[JN132|Partners in Time!]]'', Cilan appeared alongside Brock and Alexa, watching Ash's [[Masters Eight Tournament]] match against {{an|Leon}}.

In ''[[JN139|Must Be Our Heroes and the Witch!]]'', Cilan reunited with Ash and Brock and met {{an|Misty}}. After seeing that Brock was depressed, Cilan suggested that the group go to a nearby forest, where Brock was mind controlled by a wild {{p|Hatterene}}. While trying to free Brock from mind control, the group befriends a wild {{p|Hatenna}}, and were briefly controlled by Hatterene's power as well. Cilan found himself trapped in illusions with [[Ingo]] and [[Emmet]]. When Brock finally freed himself from Hatterene's powers, Cilan said goodbye to the group and revealed that he was returning to [[Unova]] to participate in a gastronomic event created by Ingo and Emmet.

He also appeared in a flashback in ''[[JN146|Ash and Latios]]''.
